name: task-queue
description: Makes Claude Code's native task list a live work queue with two event-driven hooks and zero per-prompt cost: a SessionStart hook primes the model to capture and order work as native tasks, re-surfaces a repo's unfinished tasks from earlier sessions, and hydrates the queue from a committed roadmap/backlog file when present; a TaskCompleted hook advances the queue to the next unblocked task. Goes quiet (one-line re-anchor) once the standing policy is recorded in the project's CLAUDE.md. Read-only over ~/.claude/tasks.
